rationale: Caught SkillResolutionError for zip-derived skill names and return HTTP 400 instead of surfacing a server error.
Top-level automated review summary; actionable inline comments are tracked separately.
Root SKILL.md uploads now convert invalid fallback filenames to HTTP 400 with regression coverage.
Nested skill directory uploads now convert invalid root prefixes to HTTP 400 with regression coverage.
Zip extraction now uses mkdtemp with explicit cleanup and shutil.move, avoiding TemporaryDirectory cleanup after moving the source path.
